DataAccessLayer - package DataAccessLayer

Implementation of the Storage interface using a Microsoft SQL Server database.

Detects whether the circuit contains any cycles.

Disconnect from a pin.

Calculates the Euclidean distance from this pin to a given point.

Drag the end point to a new location.

Drag the start point to a new location.

Draws the AND gate on the canvas.

Draws the component on the given graphics context.
draw(Graphics) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Connector
Draws the wire on the graphics context.

Draws the LED on the given Graphics context.

Draws the NAND gate on the canvas.

Draws the NOR gate on the canvas.

Draws the NOT gate on the canvas.
draw(Graphics) - Method in class BusinessLayer.OR
Draws the OR gate on the canvas.
draw(Graphics) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Switch
Draws the switch on a graphics canvas.

Draws the XOR gate on the provided graphics context.
